title: Suppression Entry
description: A contact that must never be sent to. Suppression is one-directional: entries are added, never silently removed by an agent.

added_at.description: ISO-8601 date/time the suppression was recorded.

source.description: Where the suppression came from (reply_handling, bounce_webhook, founder, privacy_runbook).

permanent.description: Whether this suppression is permanent (legal/privacy/do_not_contact are always permanent).
